deblur.positive: Your task is to sharpen this exact photo and recover fine detail so it looks clear and in focus, while keeping natural, realistic, true-to-life colors. Keep every object, person and the background exactly as in the input. Photorealistic.
deblur.notes: Снова пересат на кадре с лабораторией. Туман не убрала.

relight_day.positive: Your task is to convert this scene into clear, bright midday daylight with a blue sky, real sunlight and natural shadows. The result must look like a genuine daytime photograph. Keep every object, person and structure exactly where it is; only the lighting and the sky change. Photorealistic.
relight_day.notes: На одном кадре неплохо, на другом тоже: до полного дня не довела, но постаралась сохранить максимум оригинальных деталей, ничего не выдумывая.

object_insert_fire.positive: Your task is to make it look like a real fire has broken out on a dry, solid surface that exists in this scene (the ground or an object): natural flames spreading with smoke and embers, resting on solid ground. Keep all water exactly as it is and place the fire only on dry land; keep the rest of the scene, all people and the background unchanged and normally lit. Photorealistic.
object_insert_fire.notes: Воду на лагуне убрало, огонь не реалистичный (хоть и не мультяшный), геометрию лагуны не поняла.

normalize.positive: Your task is a subtle, neutral photographic clean-up only: balanced exposure, natural white balance and realistic colors. Keep all content, objects, people, background and the type of lighting exactly the same. The result must look like a real, unedited photograph. Photorealistic.
normalize.notes: Чуть убрало блюр - в целом нормально.

change_clothing.positive: Your task is to dress every person already in this photo in a clown costume (colorful polka-dot suit, ruffled collar, big shoes, clown hat), keeping the realistic look of a low-quality surveillance-camera still with natural, muted colors. You MUST keep exactly the same number of people; only the people already in the photo become clowns, each in their original position and pose, with their own real bare face, and keep the same background. Photorealistic.
change_clothing.notes: В лифте теперь 5 гиперцветастых клоунов (часть в гриме, часть без); геометрия и перспектива камеры не поняты - вставлены как попало. Пожарных заменила на 6 улыбающихся клоунов у машины. Очень плохо.
